releases.author: sylcool
releases.description:
- [x] 修复了模板不能重复利用的问题。
- [x] Fixed the issue where a template cannot be reused multiple times.
````markdown
```pack-view test1
name = "Super10"
```

---

```pack-view test1
name = "Sylcool"
```
````
